name: healthchecks
title: Healthchecks
description: Cron job monitoring service — listens for pings from your scheduled tasks and alerts when they don't arrive on time. Supports email, Slack, Discord, ntfy, PagerDuty, and 25+ integrations.

variables.name: HEALTHCHECKS_SECRET_KEY
variables.label: Secret Key
variables.description: Django secret key (generate with: openssl rand -base64 36)
